title: Bedtime / WCIFS
description: The Bedtime / "When can I finally sleep?" mod shows you how long it is until night when clicking a bed.
body: # Bedtime / WCIFS [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/wcifs&query=$.downloads&suffix=%20Downloads&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wcifs/) ## What it does The simple Bedtime / "When can I finally sleep" (WCIFS) mod shows you how long you have to wait until you can sleep when clicking on a bed. ## Supported Versions | Minecraft Version | Status | |-------------------|-----------| | 26.2 | Supported | | 26.1 - 26.1.2 | Supported | | 1.19.2 - 1.21.11 | Supported | | 1.19 - 1.19.1 | Supported | | 1.17 - 1.18.2 | Supported | This code is licensed under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed).
